description: Low-level calls that decode return values without checking `returndatasize` can read zeroed or truncated data. Attackers can craft contracts that return short payloads so callers mis-interpret success flags, prices, or balances.
name: Missing Return Data Length Validation
remediation: - Verify `returndatasize` matches expected length before decoding. - Prefer high-level interfaces that perform ABI decoding checks. - Revert on unexpected return sizes and log anomalies.
